# comfyui_repeat_image_batch (Resource)

ComfyUI RepeatImageBatch node [image/batch]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `amount` (Number) Input: INT default: 1
- `image` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)

### Read-Only
